reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de los chicos del hotel ….. las habitaciones super tranquilas .  y seguras .. un espacio para no solo dormir ,. Sino poder salir a recorrer ,.. la verdad muy buena la comida …. Se recomienda y mucho !
Gracias infinitas

Excellent service from the hotel staff... the rooms were super quiet and safe... a place not just to sleep, but also to go out and explore... the food was really good... Highly recommended!
Thank you so much!

reviews.comment:
Estuve unos días por trabajo en la hostería y me sentí como en casa. Jorge y Fernanda son personas super amables y agradables. Riquísimos los budines de manzana y choco con nuez.

(Translated by Google)
I stayed at the inn for a few days for work and felt right at home. Jorge and Fernanda are incredibly kind and friendly. The apple and chocolate walnut puddings were delicious.
